name: Question
about: Methodology, data, or extension question
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question
---

## Question category
- [ ] Methodology (estimator choice, identification, etc.)
- [ ] Data (variable definitions, sources, etc.)
- [ ] Extension (alternative specifications, new events, etc.)
- [ ] Other

## Your question
A clear and concise description of your question.

## Context
What part of the dissertation or replication code does your question relate to?
- [ ] Chapter 4 (event study)
- [ ] Chapter 5 (panel regression, H3 amplification)
- [ ] Appendix A (robustness)
- [ ] Appendix B (placebo)
- [ ] Appendix C (VPIN)
- [ ] Appendix D (GM model calibration)
- [ ] Appendix E (cross-exchange)
- [ ] Appendix F (multi-event replication)

## What you've already checked
- [ ] Read the relevant chapter/appendix in the dissertation
- [ ] Read `docs/METHODOLOGY.md`
- [ ] Searched existing issues

## Additional context
Optional — any relevant background, alternative approaches you've considered, etc.
